name: Terrestrial Brain (Dev)
description: Dev build of Terrestrial Brain. Syncs your Obsidian vault to Terrestrial Brain, an AI-powered second brain backed by Supabase. Notes are automatically ingested after a configurable delay and can be searched, analyzed, and enriched by AI agents via the Terrestrial Brain MCP server. AI-generated output is delivered back into your vault for review. Requires a deployed Terrestrial Brain MCP endpoint (Supabase Edge Function).
author: Anastasia
